Source code for killMS.Other.Counter

#!/usr/bin/env python

from __future__ import absolute_import
from __future__ import division
from __future__ import print_function
import numpy as np



[docs]
class Counter():
    '''
    Counter class
    '''
    def __init__(self,
                 N:int=1):
        '''
        Count every N. Start counts at 1.
        
        :param self: Counter
        :param N: Value counted
        :type N: int
        '''
        if N==0: N=1
        self.N=N
        self.i=-1

    def __call__(self) -> int:
        '''
        Count for N.
        
        :param self: Counter
        '''
        i=self.i
        #print "%i -> %i"%(i,i+1)
        self.i+=1
        Cond=(self.i%self.N==0)
        return Cond






[docs]
class CounterTime():
    '''
    Count for time, in batches of 60.
    '''
    def __init__(self,
                 dt:int=60):
        '''
        Initialise to count time. Default is 1 minute count.
        
        :param self: CounterTime
        :param dt: maximum time to count towrads
        :type dt: int
        '''
        self.dt=dt
        self.CurrentTime=-1e6

    def __call__(self,
                 time) -> bool:
        '''
        Count time
        
        :param self: CounterTime
        :param time: time to count in minutes
        '''
        rep=False
        #print time,self.CurrentTime,(time-self.CurrentTime)
        if (np.abs(time-self.CurrentTime)>self.dt):
            self.CurrentTime=time+self.dt
            rep=True
        return rep
